slides.title: PPT生成を黒箱から設計された体験へ

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>AI slide workflow</title><desc>mockup schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#0b1020" /><text x="48" y="58" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">AI slide workflow</text><rect x="48" y="84" width="70" height="4" rx="2" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="170" y="116" width="620" height="310" rx="28" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><rect x="170" y="116" width="620" height="46" rx="28" fill="#1c263c" /><circle cx="198" cy="139" r="5" fill="#2dd4bf" /><circle cx="216" cy="139" r="5" fill="#2a3751" /><circle cx="234" cy="139" r="5" fill="#2a3751" /><rect x="212" y="198" width="536" height="64" rx="18" fill="#143a42" stroke="#2dd4bf" /><circle cx="228" cy="294" r="7" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="248" y="287" width="470" height="14" rx="7" fill="#1c263c" /><text x="750" y="299" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#c6d0df">Ask</text><circle cx="228" cy="332" r="7" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="248" y="325" width="452" height="14" rx="7" fill="#1c263c" /><text x="750" y="337" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#c6d0df">Choose pattern</text><circle cx="228" cy="370" r="7" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="248" y="363" width="434" height="14" rx="7" fill="#1c263c" /><text x="750" y="375" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#c6d0df">Verify</text><circle cx="228" cy="408" r="7" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="248" y="401" width="416" height="14" rx="7" fill="#1c263c" /><text x="750" y="413" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#c6d0df">Render</text></svg>
elements.longDescription: mockup schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.

elements.text:
PPT生成を
黒箱から
設計された体験へ
文字だけではなく、モックアップやフローを主役にした見せ方へ切り替えます。

slides.title: 図解パターンを選ぶだけで見た目が決まる

slides.title: 文字だけの説明はモックアップで体験に変える

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>生成結果の確認画面</title><desc>mockup schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#0b1020" /><text x="48" y="58" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">生成結果の確認画面</text><rect x="48" y="84" width="70" height="4" rx="2" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="170" y="116" width="620" height="310" rx="28" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><rect x="170" y="116" width="620" height="46" rx="28" fill="#1c263c" /><circle cx="198" cy="139" r="5" fill="#2dd4bf" /><circle cx="216" cy="139" r="5" fill="#2a3751" /><circle cx="234" cy="139" r="5" fill="#2a3751" /><rect x="212" y="198" width="536" height="64" rx="18" fill="#143a42" stroke="#2dd4bf" /><circle cx="228" cy="294" r="7" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="248" y="287" width="470" height="14" rx="7" fill="#1c263c" /><text x="750" y="299" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#c6d0df">DeckSpec</text><circle cx="228" cy="332" r="7" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="248" y="325" width="452" height="14" rx="7" fill="#1c263c" /><text x="750" y="337" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#c6d0df">Preview</text><circle cx="228" cy="370" r="7" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="248" y="363" width="434" height="14" rx="7" fill="#1c263c" /><text x="750" y="375" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#c6d0df">Warnings</text><circle cx="228" cy="408" r="7" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="248" y="401" width="416" height="14" rx="7" fill="#1c263c" /><text x="750" y="413" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#c6d0df">PPTX</text></svg>

slides.title: 視覚の主役を1つに絞る

elements.text: 背景、カード、アイコン、表を同時に主張させず、1枚ごとに役割を切り替えます。

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10 3l1.6 4.4L16 9l-4.4 1.6L10 15l-1.6-4.4L4 9l4.4-1.6L10 3Z" /></svg>

sources.title: Slideland reference categories
sources.notes: Uses Slideland categories as inspiration only; visuals are generated by pptcreater presets.
